app.name: iocraft
app.one_liner: A Rust crate for building beautiful, artisanally crafted CLIs, TUIs, and text-based IO with a React-inspired declarative syntax.

screens.name: Main Terminal View
screens.purpose: Render the primary user interface composed of styled, bordered, and layout-managed text elements.
primary_actions: Render to terminal or log output

rust_commands.name: render_ui
rust_commands.purpose: Render a declaratively defined terminal UI to stdout using the iocraft engine.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement basic 'Hello, world!' view with border and color
week 1: Verify cross-platform rendering on Unix and Windows
acceptance_tests: The application renders a bordered, colored 'Hello, world!' message in the terminal without ANSI escape code interference.
UI layout adapts correctly using flexbox principles as provided by Taffy integration.
